name: multi-llm-marketplace
description: Skyline plugins for Claude Code, including MCP daemon wiring and agent-side enforcement hooks.

plugins.name: core-claude
plugins.description: Opinionated Claude Code baseline: /core-claude:setup installs the judge-hook rules engine, the writing-guard, the core-hud statusline, and CLAUDE.md guidelines, with a full-bypass permission posture gated by the judge-hook. Skyline-aware judge (Bash/Write/Edit rules also bind skyline_run/create/edit), transcript-fed escalations, and /core-claude:doctor read-only install audits.

plugins.name: soloterm-agent-org
plugins.description: Skylence agent-org v2 in a box (operator redesign 2026-06-10). Bundles the Solo MCP server (board/PTY/timer substrate every role needs) plus 5 role skills: orchestrator, planner (machine-wide singleton on the strongest model at max effort, plans grounded in the skybox code graph: epics, child issues, dispatch-ready briefs, blocker graph), solo-worker, replacer, org-audit — plus peer-orchestrator coordination doctrine. 3 session-discipline hooks: org-lane-mark (PreToolUse marker on Solo spawn/timer tools), org-conduct-refresh (SessionStart post-compaction re-injection of the role-skill re-read order — summaries keep facts, not conduct), org-stop-gate (Stop gate blocking a marked session's first stop with the anti-idle checklist). Includes build-slot compile serializer, ghost-probe PTY check (no-fusion law), and the Codex-side conduct pack.
